name: dc-blast-radius
description: Visualize architectural risk in your editor — see which symbols are safe to change and which ones can break everything

viewsWelcome.contents: Click a DC Blast Radius CodeLens above any symbol to see its dependents.

blastRadius.thresholds.localSharedMax.description: Max unique external files for local-shared tier (amber). Above this becomes global-shared (red).

blastRadius.thresholds.globalSharedLow.description: Upper bound for low-intensity global-shared (light red)

blastRadius.thresholds.globalSharedMed.description: Upper bound for medium-intensity global-shared. Above this becomes high-intensity red.

blastRadius.symbolKinds.description: Which symbol kinds to analyze. Options: Function, Class, Method, Interface, Enum, Variable, Constant, Property.

blastRadius.concurrencyLimit.description: Max concurrent reference lookups per file. Lower = less load on language server.
